narrative:
Mill Township has 2,807 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.3 percentage points.
